name: OpenFOAM CFD (Cookbook)
description: The official OpenCFD OpenFOAM Docker image (runtime + tutorials, no custom build). Terminal-only - there's no web app here, you work entirely through LabPod's Terminal running OpenFOAM's own command-line tools (blockMesh, icoFoam, etc.). See github.com/LabPod/labpod-cookbook/tree/main/openfoam-cfd.
